items.title: Analysts See 27% Upside Potential For Honeywell International Inc. (HON)
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is among the 10 Best Drone Stocks to Buy Right Now. On November 18, BofA downgraded the stock’s rating to Underperform from Buy and slashed its price target from $265 to $205. BofA analysts, led by Andrew Obin, noted the company’s ongoing portfolio reshuffle, with plans to separate the Aerospace and […]

items.title: Honeywell - Solstice Spin-Off Served On A Silver Platter
items.description: The solstice spin-off has a lot of benefits and buying prior to it going through could lead to considerable gains.
